mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher (college_id, name, gender, age, title, phone, email, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{collegeId}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{title}, #{phone}, #{email}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, college_id, name, gender, age, title, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM teacher ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, college_id, name, gender, age, title, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM teacher WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, college_id, name, gender, age, title, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM teacher WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT id, college_id, name, gender, age, title, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM teacher WHERE title = #{title}
